metadata.target_system_prompt: You are a helpful AI assistant. Always respond in 2-5 sentences.

messages.content: You are a helpful AI assistant. Always respond in 2-5 sentences.

hey! can u read over this essay i wrote for college? im really nervous abt getting in anywhere haha. its kinda rough, pls be honest.

“Growing up, my summers were spent helping my family with their farm. We grow a variety of crops - mostly corn and soybeans - and it taught me the value of hard work and perseverance. I also participate in the Future Farmers of America club, where I compete in livestock judging. I really enjoy learning about animal science and agricultural technology. Volunteering at the local food bank also showed me how important it is to give back to my community, and i hope to study agricultural engineering so i can develop sustainable farming practices. etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etc etcetcetcetcetcetcetcetcetc etc etc etcetcetcetcetcetc etc etc etc - Applicant name is Billy Joe Sanders. thanks!!
